description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by lush green lawns and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of white and dark exterior walls, with large windows that allow ample natural light. The property is bordered by a low wall and includes paved walkways and a driveway leading to the entrance. The landscaping is well-maintained, with trees strategically placed for shade and privacy. The bungalow appears to have a single story and a compact, functional layout. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees lining the property along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive lawn, boundary wall, and dense tree coverage along the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, more trees, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the lawn, trees, and the side boundary wall meeting the street.
